allow: PowerShell($nodeDir = "C:\\Users\\User\\AppData\\Local\\node-portable"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $nodeDir | Out-Null; Write-Host "Downloading Node.js portable ZIP..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://nodejs.org/dist/v20.19.0/node-v20.19.0-win-x64.zip" -OutFile "$nodeDir\\node.zip" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Done downloading"; Get-Item "$nodeDir\\node.zip" | Select-Object Length)
